mapper.select: select from visitors order by timestamp DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(timestamp, '%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM visitors WHERE timestamp >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(timestamp) ORDER BY date ASC
mapper.insert: insert into visitors (id, ip, browser, device, timestamp) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{browser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{device,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into visitors
id, ip, browser, device, timestamp,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{browser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{device,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
